title: Kyiv: 294 drones intercepted
title_en: Kyiv: 294 drones intercepted
description: At least 3 killed, 63 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day. Russia launched 294 drones overnight, Ukraine's Air Force said, adding that 269 of them were shot down.

title: Ukraine holds on thanks to those who, with their courage, dedication...
title_en: Ukraine holds on thanks to those who, with their courage, dedication...
title_uk: Україна тримається завдяки тим, хто своєю мужністю, самовідданістю...
description: Ukraine holds on thanks to those who, with their courage, dedication and strength, provide us with the opportunity to be - to be ourselves, to be Ukraine. For the fifth year, we are facing an enemy who is bigger than us, but who is not getting what he wants. And thanks to our people, thanks to our Ukrainian determination to defend ourselves, we will definitely stop Russia and guarantee the safety of our state and people. Noted...
description_en: Ukraine holds on thanks to those who, with their courage, dedication and strength, provide us with the opportunity to be - to be ourselves, to be Ukraine. For the fifth year, we are facing an enemy who is bigger than us, but who is not getting what he wants. And thanks to our people, thanks to our Ukrainian determination to defend ourselves, we will definitely stop Russia and guarantee the safety of our state and people. Noted...
description_uk: Україна тримається завдяки тим, хто своєю сміливістю, відданістю та силою забезпечують нам можливість бути – бути собою, бути Україною. П’ятий рік ми стоїмо проти ворога, який більше, ніж ми, але який не досягає того, чого хоче. І завдяки нашим людям, завдяки нашій українській налаштованості захиститись ми обовʼязково зупинимо Росію та гарантуємо безпеку для нашої держави й людей. Відзначив...

title: Kharkiv: Attack attack on infrastructure
title_en: Kharkiv: Attack attack on infrastructure
description: Russian attack damages infrastructure in Odesa Oblast and Kharkiv. Russian forces launched overnight strikes targeting critical and civilian infrastructure across parts of Ukraine on the night of May 15–16, with attacks reported in Odesa Oblast and Kharkiv, according to regional authorities.
description_en: Russian attack damages infrastructure in Odesa Oblast and Kharkiv. Russian forces launched overnight strikes targeting critical and civilian infrastructure across parts of Ukraine on the night of May 15–16, with attacks reported in Odesa Oblast and Kharkiv, according to regional authorities.

title: Air defense active
title_en: Air defense active
description: There are reasonable suspicions that some "Shahedas" have EW devices installed to suppress our drone interceptors, as well as EW devices to interfere with radar stations. This was stated by the adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergey "Flash" Beskrestnov. "There is nothing unexpected in this for us, but it is important to keep the whole situation under control even before the facts are confirmed," he wrote...
description_en: There are reasonable suspicions that some "Shahedas" have EW devices installed to suppress our drone interceptors, as well as EW devices to interfere with radar stations. This was stated by the adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergey "Flash" Beskrestnov. "There is nothing unexpected in this for us, but it is important to keep the whole situation under control even before the facts are confirmed," he wrote...
description_uk: Есть обоснованные подозрения, что на некоторых "Шахедах" установлены средства РЭБ для подавления наших перехватчиков-дронов, а также средства РЭБ для создания помех радиолокационным станциям. Об этом заявил советник министра обороны Сергей "Флэш" Бескрестнов. "Для нас в этом нет ничего неожиданного, но важно держать всю ситуацию под контролем еще до того, как факты будут подтверждены", - написал...

title: Statements by the president and other officials about the shortage of...
title_en: Statements by the president and other officials about the shortage of...
title_uk: Заяви президента та інших чиновників про дефіцит...
description: Statements by the president and other officials about the shortage of missiles for air defense were a provocation of the Russian Federation so that the aggressor squandered its reserves, as well as a call to Ukraine's partners to speed up deliveries. This opinion was expressed by the commander of the special forces group of the Armed Forces of Ukraine Konstantin Proshinsky: "In reality, there was no shortage. These words were simply said in order to force the Russian side...
description_en: Statements by the president and other officials about the shortage of missiles for air defense were a provocation of the Russian Federation so that the aggressor squandered its reserves, as well as a call to Ukraine's partners to speed up deliveries. This opinion was expressed by the commander of the special forces group of the Armed Forces of Ukraine Konstantin Proshinsky: "In reality, there was no shortage. These words were simply said in order to force the Russian side...
description_uk: Заявления президента и других официальных лиц о дефиците ракет для ПВО были провоцированием рф на то, чтобы агрессор растратил свои запасы, а также призывом к партнерам Украины ускорить поставки Такое мнение высказал командир группы спецподразделения ЗСУ Константин Прошинский: "На самом деле никакого дефицита не было. Эти слова просто говорились для того, чтобы вынудить российскую сторону...

title: Chernihiv: We clearly understand what is being discussed between Russia and the...
title_en: Chernihiv: We clearly understand what is being discussed between Russia and the...
title_uk: Чернігів: Ми чітко розуміємо, про що йде мова між Росією і...
description: We clearly understand what is being discussed between Russia and the leadership of Belarus. The Russians have now become more active - I mean, in the conversation with Oleksandr Lukashenka. They want to involve Belarus much more in the war and start additional aggressive operations from the territory of Belarus - either against our Chernihiv-Kyiv direction, or against one of the NATO countries that are close to Belarus. Of course we...
description_en: We clearly understand what is being discussed between Russia and the leadership of Belarus. The Russians have now become more active - I mean, in the conversation with Oleksandr Lukashenka. They want to involve Belarus much more in the war and start additional aggressive operations from the territory of Belarus - either against our Chernihiv-Kyiv direction, or against one of the NATO countries that are close to Belarus. Of course we...
description_uk: Чітко розуміємо, що обговорюється між Росією та керівництвом Білорусі. Пішла зараз більша активність росіян – я маю на увазі, у розмові з Олександром Лукашенком. Хочуть значно більше втягнути Білорусь у війну та саме з території Білорусі розпочати додаткові агресивні операції – або проти нашого Чернігівсько-Київського напрямку, або проти однієї з країн у НАТО, які поруч із Білоруссю. Звісно, ми...

They discussed further parliamentary efforts to ensure...
description_en: 🤝 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andrii Sybiga held a meeting with PACE President Petra Bair on the sidelines of the 135th session of the Committee of Ministers in Chisinau. 💬 "Grateful to PACE for unwavering support of Ukraine, in particular for actively promoting the creation of the Special Tribunal for the Crime of Aggression against Ukraine and the international compensation mechanism. They discussed further parliamentary efforts to ensure...
description_uk: 🤝 Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга провів зустріч з Президенткою ПАРЄ Петрою Байр на полях 135-ї сесії Комітету міністрів у Кишиневі. 💬 "Вдячний ПАРЄ за непохитну підтримку України, зокрема за активне просування створення Спеціального трибуналу щодо злочину агресії проти України та міжнародного компенсаційного механізму. Обговорили подальші парламентські зусилля для забезпечення...

title: Luhansk: The Ryazansky Refinery, ships, ammunition depots and enemy radars...
title_en: Luhansk: The Ryazansky Refinery, ships, ammunition depots and enemy radars...
title_uk: Луганськ: Рязанський НПЗ, кораблі, склади боєприпасів і ворожі радари...
description: The Ryazansky Refinery, ships, ammunition depots and enemy radars were hit Yesterday and on the night of May 15, 2026, units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine inflicted damage on a number of important objects of the Russian occupiers. ⚡️In particular, the oil refinery "Ryazanskyi" in Ryazan (Ryazan region, Russian Federation) was affected. A large-scale fire was recorded on the territory of the facility. Ryazansky Refinery is one of the largest oil refineries...
description_en: The Ryazansky Refinery, ships, ammunition depots and enemy radars were hit Yesterday and on the night of May 15, 2026, units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine inflicted damage on a number of important objects of the Russian occupiers. ⚡️In particular, the oil refinery "Ryazanskyi" in Ryazan (Ryazan region, Russian Federation) was affected. A large-scale fire was recorded on the territory of the facility. Ryazansky Refinery is one of the largest oil refineries...
description_uk: Уражено НПЗ “Рязанський”, кораблі, склади боєприпасів та РЛС противника Вчора та в ніч на 15 травня 2026 року підрозділи Сил оборони України завдали уражень по низці важливих об’єктів російських окупантів. ⚡️Зокрема уражено нафтопереробний завод “Рязанський” у Рязані (Рязанська обл., рф). На території об’єкта зафіксовано масштабну пожежу. НПЗ “Рязанський” є одним із найбільших нафтопереробних...

title: The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs: "We are creating an...
title_en: The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs: "We are creating an...
description: The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs: "We are creating an infrastructure of responsibility based on three main elements: the Special Tribunal, the Register of Damages and the Compensation Commission. I also want to emphasize: responsibility will never be a subject of compromises. Justice is an integral element of lasting peace."
description_en: The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs: "We are creating an infrastructure of responsibility based on three main elements: the Special Tribunal, the Register of Damages and the Compensation Commission. I also want to emphasize: responsibility will never be a subject of compromises. Justice is an integral element of lasting peace."
description_uk: Глава МЗС: "Ми створюємо інфраструктуру відповідальності, що спирається на три основні елементи: Спеціальний трибунал, Реєстр збитків та Компенсаційну Комісію. Хочу також підкреслити: відповідальність ніколи не стане предметом компромісів. Справедливість — це невід'ємний елемент тривалого миру".

title: Kharkiv: ⚔️ 129 OVMBr liberated Odradne in Kharkiv Oblast ➡️ Katsaps were...
title_en: Kharkiv: ⚔️ 129 OVMBr liberated Odradne in Kharkiv Oblast ➡️ Katsaps were...
title_uk: Харків: ⚔️ 129 ОВМБр звільнила Одрадне Харківської області ➡️ Кацапи були...
description: ⚔️ 129 OVMBr liberated Odradne in Kharkiv Oblast ➡️ Katsaps were destroyed near Odradne. As a result of the planned operation, the Defense Forces carried out a cleanup and brought back under full control the settlement of Odradne and its surroundings. ✈️ New war tactics bring results, the enemy suffered significant losses in defense, and those who managed to escape escaped. 129 OVMBr continues to free Ukrainian land from Katsap...
description_en: ⚔️ 129 OVMBr liberated Odradne in Kharkiv Oblast ➡️ Katsaps were destroyed near Odradne. As a result of the planned operation, the Defense Forces carried out a cleanup and brought back under full control the settlement of Odradne and its surroundings. ✈️ New war tactics bring results, the enemy suffered significant losses in defense, and those who managed to escape escaped. 129 OVMBr continues to free Ukrainian land from Katsap...
description_uk: ⚔️ 129 ОВМБр звільнила Одрадне на Харківщині ➡️ Кацапів розбито поблизу Одрадного. В результаті спланованої операції Сили Оборони здійснили зачистку та повернули під повний контроль населений пункт Одрадне та його околиці. ✈️ Нові тактики війни приносять результат, в обороні ворог поніс значні втрати, а хто зумів — рятувався втечею. 129 ОВМБр продовжує звільняти українську землю від кацапської...
